title: ilex vitis-idaea
intro: Ilex vitis-idaea, also known as wintergreen, is a small, evergreen shrub native to Northern Europe and Asia. It contains methyl salicylate, a compound with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which is similar to aspirin. The medicinal properties of wintergreen have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Wintergreen is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and improving circulation.
